name: Disaster Response — Search and Rescue Coordination
description: Following a simulated natural disaster, AMOS coordinates drones and ground robots to search damaged infrastructure, locate survivors, and relay communications.
audience: Robotics developers, emergency response agencies, infrastructure operators

injects.message: DISASTER ALERT: Magnitude 6.2 earthquake reported. Search and rescue operation initiated. All assets deploying.

injects.description: Infrastructure damage — cell towers offline, comms degraded

injects.message: COMMS IMPACT: Regional communications degraded. AMOS mesh network activated as backup relay.
AERIAL SURVEY: Drones mapping damage zone. Grid search pattern initiated — 6 sectors assigned.
DETECTION: Collapsed structure identified in Sector 3. Thermal signatures detected — possible survivors. Ground robot dispatched.

injects.description: Gas leak detected — hazard zone established

injects.message: HAZARD: Gas leak detected Sector 2. CBRN sensor confirms. Exclusion zone established. Rerouting ground teams.

injects.description: Second collapse site — heat signatures detected

injects.message: PRIORITY UPDATE: Second collapse site found. 4 thermal signatures. AMOS prioritizing — dispatching nearest available assets.

injects.description: Extended operations — battery drain on survey drones

injects.message: LOGISTICS: 3 drones below 30% battery. Auto-rotation schedule activated — continuous coverage maintained.
MISSION UPDATE: 2 collapse sites located, 6+ potential survivors identified, 1 hazard zone mapped. Rescue teams guided to priority sites.
MISSION COMPLETE: Full damage assessment delivered. Rescue coordination active. SITREP transmitted to incident command.
